coverLetterText:
Dear Hiring Manager,
This is my resume, i hope can work in your company

details: Resume: Ms_Wong_AI_Resume • Cover Letter: Written cover letter (291 words)
coverLetterText:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the [Job Title] position at [Company Name]. I am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Software Engineering (Honours) at Tunku Abdul Rahman University of Management and Technology (TAR UMT), and I am eager to apply my technical knowledge, problem-solving skills, and passion for software development in a professional environment.

Throughout my academic journey, I have developed a strong foundation in software engineering principles, web application development, database management, and software project management. I have experience developing web-based applications using technologies such as Python (Flask), Java, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, and Git. I am also familiar with Agile development practices, version control using GitHub, and collaborative software development.

Recently, I have been involved in developing a Job Portal Website as part of a software engineering project, where I contributed to front-end development, system integration, acceptance testing, and resolving merge conflicts using Git. This project has strengthened my technical abilities as well as my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills.

In addition, my internship experience allowed me to work on real-world web development projects, including implementing user authentication features, integrating databases, and enhancing website functionality. Through these experiences, I learned the importance of writing maintainable code, collaborating with team members, and delivering quality software that meets user requirements.

I am a fast learner, responsible, and highly motivated to continuously improve my technical skills. I enjoy taking on new challenges and am confident that I can make a positive contribution to your team while continuing to grow as a software engineer.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills, enthusiasm, and experiences align with your organization's needs. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to speak with you.
